hooks.command: b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); t=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); if [ -n "$b" ] && [ "${b#$t}" = "$b" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Reminder: no branch for today. Create one: git checkout -b $t-<task-name>\",\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Current branch is $b, not a dated branch for $t. The user wants a new branch each day named <date>-<task>. Remind them and offer to create it.\"}}"; fi
